arts.ttl: Martin Keown insists Arsenal HAVEN'T taken a step backwards this season - despite Mikel Arteta's players sitting 10 points behind Premier League leaders Liverpool
arts.sum: The Gunners have challenged for the ultimate honours in the English top flight for a number of seasons, but have failed to overturn Manchester City the last two times of asking.

arts.ttl: Major Arsenal Edu replacement hint dropped amid sporting director search ahead of transfer window
arts.sum: Ayto is another name linked with the role, with football.london understanding he worked on profiles like Martin Zubimendi. Campos worked at AS Monaco, bringing in Bernardo Silva and Fabinho to the club before moving to Lille, where he signed Rafael Leao for £5million and sold him for £25m and played a big role in the moves of Nicolas Pepe and Gabriel to Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta replacement tipped amid Arsenal Premier League title race pressure
arts.sum: Jay Bothroyd, the former Arsenal striker, believes a current Premier League manager has the credentials to succeed Mikel Arteta at the Emirates Stadium if he leaves the club. "When it comes to Iraola and the job that he’s done at Bournemouth with the players and no disrespect to them, but Arsenal need something like that because as much as I am not on that level of saying Arteta out, a lot of people are and who is available that could come to Arsenal?," Bothroyd told the BBC.

arts.ttl: Met Office meteorologist makes brutal Arsenal jibe as he delivers UK weather warning
arts.sum: Seizing the opportunity to tease Arsenal, who recently lost 1-0 at home to West Ham United in the Premier League, Burkill compared the falling temperatures to the club's dropping points. Arsenal dropping some points as we go into the weekend.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta asks big-name transfer guru to replace Edu at Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has reportedly approached Paris Saint-Germain chief Luis Campos over replacing Edu as sporting director at the Emirates Stadium. Campos has a great reputation in the game for some smart work in the transfer market during stints at Lille, Monaco and current employers PSG. “I got gay tendencies and kissed him on […] The post Mikel Arteta asks big-name transfer guru to replace Edu at Arsenal appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville explains why he has 'little sympathy' for Arsenal in brutal statement
arts.sum: At the start of the season, Neville predicted Arsenal would win the Premier League and end City's reign of dominance. Before tonight's matches for the Gunners and Liverpool, Mikel Arteta's side sit 11 points behind the league leaders with a game in hand on the Merseyside club.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sticks with controversial front three after Arsenal's disappointing defeat against West Ham... as Raheem Sterling is benched AGAIN for trip to Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Arteta has been forced to improvise in attack of late with Bukayo Saka , Kai Havertz , Gabriel Jesus and Gabriel Martinelli all injured during this decisive stage of the Premier League campaign.

arts.ttl: Team news: Jorginho starts against Forest
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has made just one change to the side to take on Nottingham Forest in the Premier League tonight. The hosts come into the game six points behind us in third place, having lost their last two league matches.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Mikel Arteta sticks with controversial Arsenal plan as Nottingham Forest call made
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta takes his Arsenal side to Nottingham Forest on Wednesday night as he looks to get his side's season back on track following Saturday's defeat to West Ham

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Ruben Amorim makes call on star Man Utd are ‘losing patience with’ for Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim has confirmed his team for the crucial Premier League fixture with Nottingham Forest as the Red Devils bid to climb the table
